description:
Add the hex-required `description:` to `project/0` and a `package:` block to `mix.exs`.

Required for publish to succeed:
- `description:` — one-sentence summary (e.g. "Mutation testing for Elixir — mutates a scope, runs cited tests per mutant, emits a JSON kill/survive report.").
- `package:` with `licenses:` (see B2), `links:` (`%{"GitHub" => "https://github.com/autom8things/mutagen_ex"}`), `maintainers:`.

Note: `files:` whitelist is intentionally NOT here — it's a hygiene concern handled in the hygiene epic.

Acceptance: `mix hex.build` lists the metadata; no "missing description" error.

comments.text:
IMPLEMENTED

Extended mix.exs package metadata (mix.exs only — single allowed touch).

project/0:
- Added description: "Mutation testing for Elixir — mutates a scope, runs cited tests per mutant, emits a JSON kill/survive report." (matches README behavior)

package/0 (extended the block seeded by mutagen-y8o.2; kept licenses: ["MIT"]):
- links: %{"GitHub" => "https://github.com/autom8things/mutagen_ex"}
- maintainers: ["Manuel Zubieta"]
- files: whitelist intentionally NOT added (deferred to hygiene epic per ticket)

Verification:
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors: clean
- mix hex.build: lists Description, Licenses: MIT, Links GitHub; no missing-description error (build .tar artifact removed, not committed)

git status: only mix.exs modified.

- Requirements coverage: metadata-only ticket, no `must` requirements. Judged against Acceptance.
  - Acceptance "mix hex.build lists metadata, no missing-description error": MET. hex.build exit 0; output shows Description, Licenses: MIT, Links GitHub. Would fail if `description:` were absent from project/0 (hex emits "missing metadata fields: description").
- Intent-level scope concerns: no new external deps — confirmed, deps/0 unchanged (still only {:telemetry, "~> 1.0"}).
- Project verification: mix compile --warnings-as-errors — PASS (exit 0).
- Audit-expanded scope: none.

Diff summary (c7f4a01..HEAD):
- project/0: added description: "Mutation testing for Elixir — mutates a scope, runs cited tests per mutant, emits a JSON kill/survive report."
- package/0: added links: %{"GitHub" => "https://github.com/autom8things/mutagen_ex"} and maintainers: ["Manuel Zubieta"]; preserved licenses: ["MIT"] (seeded by mutagen-y8o.2).
- files: whitelist correctly NOT added (intentionally deferred to hygiene epic per ticket + orchestrator note — expected, not a gap).
- Comment updated to reflect deferral; no other code touched.

Verdict: PASS

Notes: hex.build wrote a mutagen_ex-0.1.0.tar artifact; it is gitignored (not in git status, not tracked) and was removed from the worktree. Tree is clean.

title: Add description + package metadata to mix.exs
